## 3. Endpoint Details

### API-001 — POST /projects

**Description:** Create a new project.  
**FSD Ref:** FSD-001  
**Auth Required:** {{Yes / No}}

**Request Body:**
```json
{
  "name": "string (required, max 255)",
  "description": "string (optional)"
}
```

**Response 201:**
```json
{
  "id": "uuid",
  "name": "string",
  "description": "string | null",
  "status": "active",
  "created_at": "ISO 8601 timestamp"
}
```

**Error Responses:**

| Status | Error Code | When |
|---|---|---|
| 422 | VALIDATION_ERROR | Required field missing or type mismatch |
| 500 | INTERNAL_ERROR | Unexpected server error |

---

### API-002 — GET /projects

**Description:** List all projects.  
**FSD Ref:** FSD-001  
**Auth Required:** {{Yes / No}}

**Query Parameters:**

| Param | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `page` | integer | No | Page number (default: 1) |
| `page_size` | integer | No | Items per page (default: 20, max: 100) |

**Response 200:**
```json
{
  "items": [{ "id": "uuid", "name": "string", "status": "string", "created_at": "timestamp" }],
  "total": 42,
  "page": 1,
  "page_size": 20
}
```

---

## 4. Common Schemas

### ProjectResponse
```json
{
  "id": "uuid",
  "name": "string",
  "description": "string | null",
  "status": "active | archived",
  "created_at": "ISO 8601",
  "updated_at": "ISO 8601"
}
```

### PaginatedResponse
```json
{
  "items": "[array of resource objects]",
  "total": "integer",
  "page": "integer",
  "page_size": "integer"
}
```

---

## 5. Error Codes

| HTTP Code | Error Code | Message | When Raised |
|---|---|---|---|
| 400 | BAD_REQUEST | {{description}} | {{condition}} |
| 404 | NOT_FOUND | Resource not found | Referenced ID does not exist |
| 422 | VALIDATION_ERROR | {{field}}: {{message}} | Request body fails Pydantic validation |
| 500 | INTERNAL_ERROR | An unexpected error occurred | Unhandled server exception |
| 503 | LLM_UNAVAILABLE | LLM provider is not responding | Ollama / OpenAI timeout or connection error |
